title: Gmail API Internal Server Error when adding labels
symptom: When attempting to add labels to Gmail messages, an Internal Server Error occurs. The error message does not specify which message is causing the issue.
applies_when: Attempting to add multiple labels at once
not_this_if: Only one label is being added at a time
root_cause: The Gmail API does not support adding multiple labels in a single request. If the AI agent attempts to add more than one label simultaneously, it triggers an Internal Server Error response from the API.
fix_steps: Modify the workflow to ensure only one label is specified for each Add Label node execution.
Test the workflow again to confirm that the error no longer occurs.
agent_instruction: Ensure that only one label is used per invocation of the Add Label tool.
